title: Bat Variants
description: Gives bats new variants! Lush and dripstone bats! Requires ETF. 9 variants so far. v1.0.8
body:
A nice texture pack that adds variants to bats.

Current Variants:

Lush Cave Bat - spawns in lush caves
![Lush bats in a lush cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5b34cde74a21973cbcae8d800069d60675595d9.png)

Dripstone Cave Bat - spawns in dripstone caves
![Dripstone bats in a dripstone cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6433dd512548345d4c8f4ae5e59b1b827e4e7f5.png)

Sculk bat - name a bat 'sculky' or spawn a bat in the deep dark (bats dont naturally spawn in the deep dark)
![Sculk bat in ancient city](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83f998fe8a154948cd8aed7e748bf72aebff33e9.png)

Dracula bat - name a bat 'dracula'
![Dracula bat near woodland mansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d3d32fbdb8abb73ffa2c9124d2dba4cdc92301.png)

Albino bat - 10% chance to spawn elsewhere (not where others spawn)
![An albino bat in a cave infront of some diorite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c94e7abeb08c2c62b19dceff4e572adac857ff3d.png)

Red and brown mushroom bats - spawns in mushroom fields (red 70% chance, brown 30% chance)
![Red and brown mushroom bats in a mushroom field](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ae538ff319d7dbfadc839f03317642db06035c1.png)

Ghost bat - spawns in dark forests at a 5% chance.
![Ghost bat in a dark forest in front of a woodland mansion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4014c5f0132e23647c41fd9758158bb222e2b8b.png)

Pale Bat - spawns in pale garden.
![A pale bat in a pale garden, with a creaking lurking behind.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d24c4af505aa54b237a8658d85e31ce2431c3e1c.png)

New! 1.0.5 adds:
Cherry Bat - spawns in cherry groves
![A cherry bat in a  cherry grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb6f819010d7d85003a4fb88f964ecdeaa933410_0.webp)
If you have any suggestions please suggest them in my [discord](https://discord.gg/wgWwV6XKbs)!
If i like them i will try add them when i can!
More will probably come soon
